scripts.test: bun test packages/syntax-packs packages/transpiler packages/graph-types packages/language-profiles packages/syntax-registry && bun run --filter web test
scripts.ci: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun test packages/syntax-packs packages/transpiler packages/graph-types packages/language-profiles packages/syntax-registry && bun run --filter web lint && bun run --filter web build && bun run --filter web test
scripts.pages:verify: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run --filter web lint && bun run --filter web pages:build
